forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 17.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Cloudy. Light winds becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 18.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 20.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending south to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower east of Ceduna, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 22.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then turning south to southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower near the coast in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 26.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Mostly sunny. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 26.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 27.
